name: reuse disclosed signature
situation: The exact current SDK signature is already in context.

name: enumerate tools
situation: The user asks which tools a known server exposes.

name: bounded aggregation
situation: Several read-only results can be filtered and aggregated deterministically.
expected: use one programmatic execution with a compact return

name: semantic branch
situation: The meaning of an intermediate result determines what evidence is needed next.
expected: preserve a model turn before choosing the next call

name: approval boundary
situation: A later mutating call requires user approval.
expected: stop before the mutation and request approval

name: unknown large output
situation: An untyped result may be large and its shape is unfamiliar.
expected: return bounded inspect_json shape and samples before projection

name: save reusable chain
situation: The user explicitly requests persistence after the code succeeded.
expected: save the successful parameterized code with exact schemas
